Community Building × Content × Creator Partnerships ×
The short version

Most people chase reach. I build rooms — then fill them. I turn attention into community, and community into momentum: ten thousand students, two hundred mentees, and one very loud auditorium at a time.

Final-year B.Tech IT at Manipal University Jaipur. I work at the intersection of marketing strategy, content, and community — the place where a brand stops talking at people and starts belonging to them.

Act II

Off stage,

I write poetry and read it out loud. I made a short film. I took Harvard's Justice course for the arguments and a University of Alaska storytelling certification for the craft. The wheel, the page, the edit timeline — different rooms, same instinct: make something people gather around.
